description: baseline - first order upwind, Jacobi preconditioner, SIMPLE
ILU(0) preconditioner - same iters but 16% slower due to setup cost
pre-compute face D and F coefficients outside comp loop - 3.7% faster
counting sort COO-to-CSR + insertion sort per row - 5.5% faster total
unsafe unchecked SpMV inner loop - 13.7% faster on cavity_100
4-way unrolled dot product in CG and BiCGSTAB - marginal 0.3%
Rhie-Chow face velocity interpolation - destabilized convergence completely
Rhie-Chow face velocity - destabilized convergence
p-prime warm start initial guess - 33% slower
precise NNZ estimate for Assembler COO - marginal, cleaner code
fused CG update loop (x,r,rTr in one pass) + unsafe - marginal
cache face_patch_map (Vec vs HashMap) + pressure correction direct assembler (no Vec<Vec<>>) - 30% faster
fuse BiCGSTAB vector loops (t·s+t·t, x+r update) + unsafe access - 8% faster
reuse a_p/sources vectors + inline p_prime gradient - marginal
relax inner linear solver tolerance 1e-6 to 1e-3 - 36% faster, same outer iters
second-order boundary correction for thermal source - 1.25e-3 to 2.57e-13 (10 orders of magnitude!)
build momentum matrix once, reuse for 3 components - 8% faster (saves 2 COO->CSR per iter)
Green-Gauss gradient precompute phi_f*area + unroll dim loop - 12% faster
simplify velocity correction (cancel V/V) + residual face loop - marginal, cleaner code
SpMV 4-way unrolling - SLOWER (row nnz=5-7 too short for unrolling benefit)
skip trivial z-momentum component for 2D cases - 3% faster
avoid SparseMatrix clone in momentum solve - marginal
reuse x_buf and BiCGSTAB solver across components - marginal
cache face geometry across SIMPLE iterations - marginal
relax momentum BiCGSTAB tol to 1e-2 - cavity_20: 40->37, cavity_50: 26->25
BiCGSTAB workspace vector reuse - 12% faster (eliminates ~250 allocations)
CG workspace reuse - no improvement (CG recreated each call anyway)
call CG directly for pressure correction - 10% faster
CG workspace reuse via cached solver in SimpleSolver - structural improvement
cache pressure correction CSR pattern - 13% faster (eliminates COO->CSR per iter)
cache momentum matrix CSR pattern - 7% faster (reuse pc_ indices)
eliminate all matrix clones via in-place value updates - marginal, cleaner code
cache cell volumes in flat array - marginal
cache face normal*area products for all face loops - 13% faster (better cache locality)
